title: Zelda CD-I Animation: The curse of the WereLink...
description:
For more videos visit my new channel, where I'm currently uploading new stuff!
http://www.youtube.com/user/PennazProductions

---------------------------------------------

This was meant to be uploaded during Halloween... ...horrible stuff happened and now I'm uploading it near the end of the year! Oh well... Hope you'll enjoy it as much as I did making it!

DO NOT ASK, SAY, THINK, EAT NOTHING ABOUT THE MUSIC!!! 
YOU CAN FIND THE TITLES OF ALL THE MUSIC I USED IN THIS ANIMATION IN THE CREDITS!!!

If you're interested, you can find the poster of the episode by following this link!
http://pennaz91.deviantart.com/#/d35x2w4

Thanks for reading!
